url_substitutions.rationale: Cambridge core book detail URL returns HTTP 500 (CMS error - book IS in catalog, retrievable via search). Search URL verified HTTP 200. Replication input is local salvaged xlsx; URL is for citation only.
anwarshaikhecon.org DNS failure consistent with decision 0005; Wayback snapshot remains accessible as authoritative archive of Shaikh's Appendix 7.2 data tables.

url_substitutions.new_value: OECD STAN 2025 via Data Explorer https://data-explorer.oecd.org/vis?df[id]=DSD_STAN@DF_STAN_2025 - IROP track only (capital stock too sparse for ROP track); requires ISIC Rev3->Rev4 crosswalk
url_substitutions.rationale: OECD ISDB 1994 vintage discontinued; OECD STAN 2025 is the canonical successor for industry-level GFCF/GOPS but provides only IROP-compatible coverage (no capital stock). Concept Match Justification required for Phase 6.

url_substitutions.rationale: STAN 2003 vintage not separately archived by OECD, but Shaikh's pre-computed derivative is in local salvaged inputs. Extension is methodologically continuous per CD2 overlap MAE=0.04.
